UI_BaseInventory_MainPanelInfo: Your Base inventory is the list of all the items inside your base. You can use the manage zones button to designate one or more zones in your base or bases.
UI_BaseInventory_ZoneManagerDesc: Base zones are used to mark your base(s), or areas within your base.
UI_BaseInventory_ZoneUpdateHint: If you are too far from a zone, its inventory will only be updated when you return.
UI_BaseInventory_ZoneAddHowTo: Click and drag to designate your Base zone.
